nasb.text: Then he shall make the woman drink the water of bitterness that brings a curse, so that the water which brings a curse will go into her and cause bitterness.

esv.text: And he shall make the woman drink the water of bitterness that brings the curse, and the water that brings the curse shall enter into her and cause bitter pain.

cnv.text: 又要叫那婦人喝這招致咒詛的苦水，這招致咒詛的水要進入她裡面，就引起痛苦。

ccb.text: 祭司要让妇人喝这可带来咒诅的苦水，不忠的妇人喝下后，肚子会感到剧痛。
